program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Create the packages/control-plane src, test, fixture, package manifest, and README layout for the RP00 Domain Model phase before individual entity models are implemented.
implemented_changes: Moves the current control-plane subphase to RP00.P01.M00.S01 in implemented state.
Creates packages/control-plane/package.json plus src, test, and fixture directories for the Domain Model phase.
Adds package layout constants, state constants, and a domain model registry that names the six control-plane entities without claiming full model completion.
Adds a synthetic-only control-plane fixture and includes packages/control-plane/test/model.test.js in the root npm test command.
Extends the RP00 validator and README with machine checks for the package layout, fixture, no-write boundary, and next subphase boundary.
Records an explicit P2 defer for weighted-ledger generator deliverable_type/UI gate mismatch without hand-editing generated ledger output.
non_goals: Does not execute production mutation or runtime target writes.
Does not import or use real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data.
Does not implement the full ProductContract, AIControlRule, HermesGate, ClaudeReviewGate, HumanApproval, or BlockedClaim models.
Does not replace H00, C00, or human approval.
Does not close RP00.P01, RP00, or RP00.P01.M01.S01.
claude_questions: Does RP00.P01.M00.S01 create the package directory layout requested by the RP00 detailed Domain Model plan?
Do the target files, package manifest, test, fixture, README, and root npm test wiring match the package layout contract?
Is the synthetic fixture explicitly no-real-data and no-write?
Does the registry avoid claiming full entity model completion or P01/RP00 completion before later subphases?
Does the validator force Hermes/local evidence, actual Claude CLI metadata, construction inspection, and next boundary before production_ready?
risk_focus: Claiming full Domain Model implementation from a package-layout slice.
Forgetting to include the new control-plane test in npm test.
Using real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data in the fixture.
Skipping actual Claude C00 review or construction inspection before production_ready.
